title: Value Added Tax (Amendment)( Act No. 2 of  2002)

sections.heading: (1) This Act may be cited as the Value Added Tax (Amend­ Title and
sections.text:
ment) Act, 2002, and shall be read as one with the Value Added commence­
ment
Tax Act, in this Act referred to as the principal Act. Cap.331
(2) This Act shall come into operation on the 1st April, 2002.

sections.heading: Section eighteen of the principal Act is amended by the Amendment
sections.text:
deletion of subsection (4) and the substitution therefor of the of section 18
following new subsection:
(4) Input tax may not be deducted or credited after a
period of one year from the date of the relevant tax invoice
or other evidence referred to in subsection (3), except in
such circumstances as may be allowed by administrative
rules made by the Commissioner-General.

sections.heading: Section twenty of the principal Act is amended by— Amendment
sections.text:
(a) the deletion of subsection (2), and of section 20
(b) the re-numbering of subsections (3) and (4) as (2), and
(3) respectively.
Single copies of this Act may be obtained/mm the Government Printer,
P. O. Box 30136,10101 Lusaka, Price K500 each.
